EASTERN NORTH ATLANTIC.
SENEGAL.
1. UNDERWATER OPERATIONS IN PROGRESS UNTIL 240001Z SEP
   BY M/V OCEAN ENDEAVOUR IN AREAS BOUND BY:
   A. 13-54.57N 017-43.18W, 13-55.21N 017-42.80W,
      13-54.13N 017-41.43W, 13-53.48N 017-42.53W.
   B. 13-44.57N 017-35.14W, 13-44.49N 017-35.59W,
      13-47.80N 017-36.26W, 13-41.16N 017-35.41W.
2. CANCEL THIS MSG 240101Z SEP 13.
